title: Logistics & Operations Experience
text:
* Managed time-sensitive delivery routes and logistics coordination.
 * Maintained performance under strict operational deadlines.
 * Developed strong workflow awareness and process optimization mindset.
 * Gained real-world exposure to supply chain operations and yard management.

title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
text:
* Architected and developed Yard-iQ (Yard Management System) for trailer tracking and warehouse operations.
 * Designed full-stack system using Next.js, Node.js, and relational database architecture.
 * Implemented role-based dashboards and workflow automation for logistics facilities.
 * Built RESTful APIs and integrated third-party systems. 
 * Deployed CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
 * Structured SaaS pricing model ($2K–$3K per facility/month).
 * Leading pilot deployment in live warehouse environment.

title: Courset INC
text:
* Refactored frontend from static HTML/CSS to React-based architecture.
 * Introduced reusable component system improving maintainability.
 * Assisted in implementing Python Flask backend integrations.
 * Improved user experience and performance across student-facing modules.
 * Contributed to AI-driven educational tooling using OpenAI APIs.
